identity.name: Cohere Health
identity.description: Cohere Health provides AI-powered clinical intelligence solutions that transform prior authorization processes into comprehensive care journey management for health plans and providers.

team.ceo_background: Third-time healthcare entrepreneur with over 20 years of experience utilizing technology and data to improve healthcare processes. Previously co-founded SCIO Health Analytics serving 50+ Fortune 500 healthcare organizations. Holds MS in Computer Science from University of Pittsburgh and MBA from University of Michigan.

competitive.market_position: Market leader in AI-powered prior authorization with 93% provider satisfaction rating

direct_competitors.name: Anterior
direct_competitors.differentiator: Raises $20M Series A, smaller scale than Cohere's enterprise focus

direct_competitors.name: Adjudicator
direct_competitors.differentiator: Focuses on optimizing PA letters for approval probability rather than full workflow automation

direct_competitors.name: Humata Health
direct_competitors.differentiator: Targets both providers and payers with comprehensive PA solution

direct_competitors.name: Banjo Health
direct_competitors.differentiator: Clinician-designed platform emphasizing end-to-end medical and pharmacy PA management

direct_competitors.name: Ethermed
direct_competitors.differentiator: No additional apps required approach, integrates directly into existing workflows

tailwinds: CMS regulatory requirements driving PA automation adoption
Growing demand for AI-powered healthcare administration
Health plans seeking to reduce administrative costs and improve provider satisfaction
headwinds: Provider resistance to automation in clinical decision-making

news.summary: Cohere Health demonstrates strong momentum with record 2025 growth following their $90M Series C raise. The company has achieved significant scale milestones including processing 12M+ prior authorization requests annually, serving 600K+ providers, and maintaining 93-94% provider satisfaction ratings. Recognition from major industry analysts (Gartner, KLAS) and awards (EY Entrepreneur of the Year, TIME's Top HealthTech) reinforces their market leadership position in clinical intelligence.

recent_events.event: Raised $90M Series C led by Temasek, bringing total funding to $200M
CEO Siva Namasivayam named EY Entrepreneur of the Year 2025 New England Award winner
Announced record 2025 growth with 10 new health plan deals and expanded platform adoption
Recently acquired Zigna AI to enhance clinical intelligence capabilities

moat_signals: Processing 12M+ annual PA requests creates significant data advantage
Native EHR integrations with Epic and other major systems

nodes.name: Anterior
nodes.relationship: Direct competitor in AI-powered prior authorization

nodes.name: CMS
nodes.relationship: Regulatory compliance partner for federal requirements

fit_score.rationale: Excellent fit for Sagard's healthcare focus with clear VC-stage characteristics despite $184M revenue. Company remains VC-backed with recent $90M Series C, indicating continued high-growth trajectory rather than PE buyout scenario. Strong market position in AI-powered healthcare administration aligns with technology thesis, and Boston headquarters fits North American geography preference.

confidence.note: Strong data quality across identity, funding, and market position with recent Series C providing fresh financial metrics, though limited team depth beyond CEO profile.
